summary: Content Protection feature set fully tested. All 14 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend verification confirms: ProtectedContent component exists at /app/frontend/src/components/ProtectedContent.jsx with data-testid='protected-content', protected-content CSS class with user-select:none exists in App.css, video elements have controlsList='nodownload noplaybackrate' and disablePictureInPicture in StoryVideoStudio.js, StoryPreview.js, Gallery.js, and PublicCreation.js. Admin abuse detection endpoints work correctly - /api/asset-access/admin/abuse-log and /api/asset-access/admin/access-stats return data for admin and reject non-admin with 403. Previous funnel tracking and streaks APIs still work (regression passed).
critical_code_review_comments: ProtectedContent.jsx: Well-implemented with event listeners for contextmenu, dragstart, selectstart, copy, cut, keydown (Ctrl+C/X/S/A/P), dblclick. Correctly excludes INPUT/TEXTAREA/SELECT/BUTTON/A from blocking.

App.css: .protected-content class has user-select:none, -webkit-touch-callout:none. Media elements have -webkit-user-drag:none. Interactive elements (button, a, input) have user-select:auto to remain functional.
StoryVideoStudio.js: ProtectedContent wraps step 8 result screen (lines 2293-2613). Video element has controlsList='nodownload noplaybackrate' and disablePictureInPicture (lines 2339-2340).
StoryPreview.js: Entire page wrapped in ProtectedContent (lines 155-539). Video element has controlsList='nodownload noplaybackrate' and disablePictureInPicture (lines 262-263).
Gallery.js: All 4 video elements have controlsList='nodownload noplaybackrate' and disablePictureInPicture (lines 113, 342, 350, 357).
PublicCreation.js: Video element has controlsList='nodownload noplaybackrate' and disablePictureInPicture (line 373).
asset_access.py: Clean implementation with rate limits (20 same-asset/5min, 100 cross-asset/5min, 30 signed-url/5min). Admin endpoints use get_admin_user dependency correctly.
protected_download.py: Integrates check_abuse() before issuing signed URLs and logs access via log_asset_access().
context_for_next_testing_agent: Content Protection system is fully operational. ProtectedContent React component wraps generated asset views (StoryPreview entire page, StoryVideoStudio step 8 result). Video elements across 4 pages have controlsList='nodownload noplaybackrate' and disablePictureInPicture attributes. Backend asset_access.py provides abuse detection with rate limits and admin endpoints at /api/asset-access/admin/abuse-log and /api/asset-access/admin/access-stats. protected_download.py integrates abuse check before issuing signed URLs. CSS rules in App.css provide user-select:none and touch-callout:none for .protected-content class while keeping interactive elements functional.
